title: TieredZ
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/gb6pPeJ.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/TieredZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/tiered/issues)


Tiered is a Fabric mod inspired by Quality Tools. Every tool and armor piece you make will have a special modifier, which provides additional stat bonuses and abilities. This mod is originally made by Draylar and this is a fork with additions with permissions to publish it. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/AlasyBr.png)
Reforge Gear Reforge your gear at the anvil for a better item tier. Reforging increases the luck for getting better item tiers. Left Slot: Tiering Item Material (if non exist, default flint (Tag: tiered:reforge_base_item)) Middle Slot: Tiering Item Right Slot: Amethyst Shard (Tag: tiered:reforge_addition)


[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
